title: AxeControl
description: Requires sneaking (Shift) to strip logs with an axe. Client-side mod for enhanced control.
body:
# AxeControl

Enhance your Minecraft woodcutting experience with **AxeControl**, a client-side mod that adds a layer of intentionality to stripping logs. This mod requires you to hold **Shift** to strip logs with an axe, giving you more control over your gameplay.

## Features
- **Shift Requirement**: Strip logs only when sneaking (Shift is held), preventing accidental actions.
- **Client-Side**: Works seamlessly on single-player worlds and multiplayer servers without server-side installation.
- **Configurable**: Enable or disable the mod via `config/axecontrol.json`.
- **Toggle Key**: Use the **Y** key (customizable) to toggle the mod on or off in-game.
- **Cross-Version Support**: Compatible with Minecraft **1.17**-**1.21.5**.

### Required Java:
- For Minecraft **1.17**-**1.18.2** — Java **16**
- For Minecraft **1.19**-**1.19.4** — Java **17**
- For Minecraft **1.20**-**1.21.5** — Java **21**
